category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts OpenDocument files to plain text; official README says odt2txt extracts text from OpenDocument Text files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is odt2txt; official GitHub repository title and README use odt2txt.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes usage-oriented project description.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/dstosberg/odt2txt, so repo enrichment is intentionally not repeated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify OpenDocument-to-text conversion; official repo language listing shows C.
